title: Verify Keep Trial option from loss aversion returns to Trial Corner
description: Test that clicking 'Keep Trial' returns user to Trial Corner without cancelling
preconditions: User is on loss aversion screen

steps.description: 1. Click 'Cancel Trial' to reach loss aversion screen
2. Click 'Keep Trial & Set Reminder' primary action
3. Verify user returns to Trial Corner

expected_result: User returns to Trial Corner with trial still active
